name: build-second-brain
description: Two powerful skills by Amritpal Singh Boparai: (1) Build Second Brain — analyze git repos commit-by-commit using parallel agent teams to extract engineering patterns, build a structured knowledge base with holistic builder profile and Claude memory injection. (2) SaaS Architect — unified enterprise backend architect for multi-tenant, multi-product SaaS systems using NestJS + Drizzle ORM + PostgreSQL + TimescaleDB + BullMQ + Redis.
